deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'python manage.py attach_yandex_env_to_fleet "New Taxi" --owner-phone 577775892 || true; python manage.py attach_bog_env_to_fleet "New Taxi" --owner-phone 577775892 || true; while true; do python manage.py import_yandex_driver_balance "New Taxi" 577775892 || true; python manage.py run_integration_sync_jobs --job bog_deposits --fleet-name "New Taxi" || true; python manage.py submit_pending_bog_payouts --fleet-name "New Taxi" || true; python manage.py run_integration_sync_jobs --job bog_payouts --fleet-name "New Taxi" || true; sleep 10; done'
